description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized human figure standing upright with arms crossed, dressed in casual attire including a shirt and pants. The figure stands atop a roughly rectangular, textured stone pedestal, which is surrounded at its base by a layer of irregular, rocky fragments. The sculpture appears to be cast in a dark, patinated metal, giving it a weathered, bluish-green appearance. The pedestal is robust and has a chiseled, uneven surface, contrasting with the smoother form of the human figure. The overall composition suggests a contemplative or authoritative stance, with the figure gazing forward. No visible signage or identifying marks are present on or near the sculpture.
description: A life-sized human figure with arms crossed stands on a rough stone pedestal surrounded by rocky fragments, cast in dark patinated metal.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the figure, the textured stone pedestal, and the rocky base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the figure's profile, arm position, and the layered rocky base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the figure's face, crossed arms, and the full frontal surface of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile and the rugged texture of the pedestal and base.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure standing with arms crossed
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears suitable for outdoor urban or park environments.
